description: Perform post-processing analysis on the Muncie HEC-RAS model located in /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie. Ensure the unsteady flow simulation results (Muncie.p04.hdf) are available, running the simulation if required. Create a Python script named extract_profile.py in /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/ to extract the longitudinal profile data at the peak flow condition, including river stations, bed elevations, water surface elevations (WSE), and flow depths. Generate the following outputs in /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/: a CSV file named longitudinal_profile.csv containing the extracted data (river_station, bed_elevation_ft, wse_ft, flow_depth_ft), a plot named longitudinal_profile.png showing Bed Elevation and Peak WSE versus River Station, and a summary text file named profile_summary.txt reporting the total number of cross-sections, maximum WSE, minimum bed elevation, and maximum flow depth.
